mapper.select: SELECT user_id, acnt_status_cd, del_yn, sec_ver, pwd_init_req_yn, pwd_chg_dtm, login_fail_cnt FROM tb_sys_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_sys_user SET login_fail_cnt = #{failureCount}, acnt_status_cd = #{accountStatusCode}, inactive_rsn_cd = #{inactiveReasonCode}, inactive_dtm = #{inactiveAt}, sec_ver = #{securityVersion}, mod_id = #{modifiedBy}, mod_dtm = #{modifiedAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
